subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 09/26] server41tests: test link triggers dir delegation recall

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a new test to the server41tests suite, which verifies that a directory delegation recall is triggered when a file is hard-linked from another client. The test creates a directory delegation without notification mask, creates a file, and then links it to a new name from a second client. It checks that the server issues a CB_RECALL in response. This patch aims to ensure that the NFSv4.1 protocol correctly handles directory delegation recalls when files are linked across clients.
